name: Tooltip
description: Floating overlay that surfaces contextual information on hover/focus. Supports single-line (small) and title+subtitle (large) layouts with dark and light color schemes.

title.description: Title text (size='large'). Auto-infers size='large' when provided.

subtitle.description: Subtitle text (size='large'). Auto-infers size='large' when provided.

size.description: Small: single text line. Large: title + subtitle. Auto-inferred from title/subtitle when omitted.

sideOffset.description: Distance in px between the tooltip and the trigger.

showArrow.description: When false, the arrow/pointer is not rendered.

TooltipProvider.description: Context provider for shared tooltip delay configuration.

TooltipTrigger.description: Wraps the trigger element. Uses asChild pattern.

TooltipContent.description: The tooltip popup content. Accepts size, variant, title, subtitle, showArrow props.

accessibility.notes: Built on Radix UI Tooltip primitives. Trigger uses asChild. Content is portaled. Keyboard accessible via focus.
